items.title: Probably the most generous gacha game out there right now
items.summary: Great designs and art. VERY generous, been playing a few months as F2P and have all characters
items.author: Luxe1203

items.title: Favorite mobile game
items.summary: Slay the Spire-inspired card battler roguelike; the team-building and character-focused gacha mechanics actually manage to improve on the core STS gameplay for me, and the art style and setting are very cool. My fave gacha
items.author: Derpa herp57529

items.title: One of the best Gacha games
items.summary: Was not the biggest card game fan until I got into this game.
items.author: Jon477

items.title: Peak Game!
items.summary:
Best gameplay/grind ratio I’ve found in the gacha genre by far, most generous pull rate, actually requires a brain to play, peak cthulhu story and art.

Did I mention there are also 200 free pulls waiting?
items.author: Far0W

items.title: What I was looking for
items.summary: I started a few months ago with the release of Pickman character and have enjoyed the game since. What drew me were the visual styles. I didn’t think I’d like the gameplay as much as I do. Gameplay can be fast paced but you still need to have strategy. Game is very generous with pulls and story is very interesting. I really like that there are interesting characters with light and balanced fan service. It is not over saturated with scantily dressed waifu nonsense- the characters are wonderfully designed with well written back story. I like this game very much and like to continue supporting it.
items.author: M.Kayyy

items.title: Amazing tactical card game
items.summary: The story is dark, gritty and immersive. Probably one of the best stories I have experienced in gatcha. The game play is actually takes thought and is super addicting. The dailies don’t take long and are actually fun to do. I would absolutely recommend playing Morimens.
items.author: HeadHunterZanko

items.title: Perfeito
items.summary:
Simplesmente o melhor gacha da vida, jogo difícil, inspirado, muito bem feito também. 

Amo demais, “nem parece ser gacha”!
